text:
There was once an old oak tree. Its branches reached high into the sky.

One summer's day something extraordinary happened. A kitten climbed onto the tree. It loved the sunlight.

The kitten snuggled amongst the coarse hairs. It sat there lazily for hours. Then, suddenly awake.

The kitten darted.

It leapt onto a different branch.

A small bird fluttered onto that branch.

"What?" sighed the kitty.

The bird sang. Its song was sweet.

The kitten cocked its head.

"What are you singing?"

"A lullaby."

That night the old oak tree sighed.

It felt good.

So it kept singing.

Birds would listen.

And sleep.

They slept.

That's how the best friend became a legend.

The old oak tree.
